results.prediction: Schedule Policy/Career legal challenge succeeds or fails
results.description: Schedule Policy/Career took effect March 8, 2026, following OPM's final rule published February 5-6, 2026, and Executive Order 14171. Unions including AFGE, AFSCME, AFL-CIO, PEER, and Democracy Forward filed a second amended complaint on March 4, 2026, in PEER v. Trump (D. Md.), challenging the executive order, OPM rule, and reclassification. No court injunction or ruling on the challenge has been issued as of March 21, 2026.
